variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS/cost of sales appears in the operating section above financial lines. The selected COGS rows are total cost rows ('Cost of Sales' / 'Cost of revenues/COGS'), so D&A is assumed embedded and nothing should be added separately.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to SG&A, admin, sales/marketing, or R&D appears in the operating section above financial lines. The selected XSGA component rows are operating expense totals ('Sales and marketing expenses' and 'Admin. Expenses'), so D&A is assumed embedded and nothing should be added separately.
